metadata.defaultTitle: Instituto Impetus — Impact, education and entrepreneurship
metadata.defaultDescription: An organization committed to social impact, education and entrepreneurship. Official sponsor of the Favela + Rica event.

hero.title: We power stories that transform.
hero.subtitle: An organization committed to social impact, education and entrepreneurship — connecting people, purpose and real opportunities.

about.title: Who we are.
about.lead: We believe talent exists everywhere — what's missing is opportunity. Instituto Impetus exists to close that gap.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: Drive social impact through education, entrepreneurship and initiatives that connect talent and opportunity.

vision.title: Vision
vision.body: To become a reference in social projects that transform realities from within the communities themselves.

values.title: Values
values.body: Purpose, dignity, accountability and collective building — in everything we do.

projects.title: What we make happen.
projects.lead: Initiatives that connect entrepreneurs, leaders and investors around a common purpose.

favelaRica.title: Favela + Rica
favelaRica.body: An event bringing together favela entrepreneurs, investors and leaders for two days of networking, pitches and high-level content.

educacao.title: Education that frees
educacao.body: A front dedicated to training, courses and mentorship to accelerate trajectories grounded in practical knowledge.

empreender.title: Entrepreneurship with purpose
empreender.body: Support for impact entrepreneurs through guidance, connections and visibility to grow sustainably.

events.title: Favela + Rica 2026.
events.body: Two intense days of networking, pitches and high-level content — connecting favela entrepreneurs to real growth opportunities.

galleryPreview.title: Event images.
galleryPreview.lead: Browse, download and share the best moments from Favela + Rica.
galleryPreview.empty: Gallery available starting June 22 — during and after the event.

blogPreview.title: Latest stories.
blogPreview.lead: Reflections, lessons and behind-the-scenes from those building impact.

contact.title: Let's talk.
contact.lead: Partnerships, institutional support or press — get in touch.

blog.title: Blog
blog.lead: Content on social impact, education and entrepreneurship.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.lead: Official event photos. Download and share.
gallery.empty: No albums available at the moment.
